creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
14:05 < sidh> kevans: in /lib only 4 lib*.so.* are in ABI tag 1401000
14:06 < sidh> and 70 in 1400097
14:09 < sidh> in /usr/lib 17 are in ABI tag 1401000
14:10 < sidh> 337 are in in 1400097
14:16 < kevans> so the vast majority of your system libraries are still 14.0
14:17 < kevans> do any of the binaries fare any better?
14:18 < kevans> are the majority of them 14.1, or 14.0?
14:18 < sidh> majority is 14.0
14:18 < sidh> by far
